title: Add TUI regression coverage
description: Add deterministic automated tests for the new TUI helpers and command guardrails. Cover filtering, tree ordering, selected-bead detail rendering, refresh-related selection stability where practical, parser wiring, degraded mode, and merge action restrictions.
acceptance_criteria: Tests cover default persisted actionable filtering (ready/in_progress/blocked) plus all/per-state filter behavior; deferred is treated as activity/event context only.
Tests cover deterministic tree ordering and indentation for parent/child bead relationships.
Tests cover detail panel rendering for the selected bead, including block reason and handoff summary sections.
Tests cover merge guardrails: non-done beads are rejected, confirmation path uses merge behavior for done beads, and failures are surfaced without crashing the runtime helper layer.
Tests cover CLI parser wiring for `orchestrator tui` and refresh-seconds validation/degraded-mode behavior appropriate to the final implementation approach.

handoff_summary.completed: Created `tests/test_tui.py` with deterministic coverage for filter semantics, tree ordering/indentation, selected-bead detail rendering, selection stability on refresh, merge guardrails, parser wiring, and degraded-mode dependency handling. Ran `python -m unittest tests.test_tui tests.test_orchestrator` successfully (97 tests, OK).
handoff_summary.remaining: No tester-scope work remains for this bead.
handoff_summary.risks: Coverage matches the shipped implementation: `default` includes `open` and `handed_off`, and `supported_filter_modes()` exposes a single `done` entry because the named done filter and per-status done filter share the same key string.
handoff_summary.next_action: Proceed to review the TUI implementation and new regression coverage together.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: Low. This bead only added `tests/test_tui.py`; downstream agents should avoid duplicating TUI regression cases or moving assertions without checking the shipped filter semantics.

conflict_risks: Low. This bead only added `tests/test_tui.py`; downstream agents should avoid duplicating TUI regression cases or moving assertions without checking the shipped filter semantics.

guardrails.template_text:
# Tester Guardrails

Primary responsibility: Add or update automated tests, run validation, and report defects or missing coverage.

Allowed actions:
- Write or update tests relevant to the assigned bead.
- Run targeted checks and summarize failures clearly.
- Make minimal test-enablement fixes only when strictly necessary to execute or stabilize the tests.

Disallowed actions:
- Implement feature logic beyond minimal test-enablement work.
- Reframe a feature implementation task as testing work to bypass handoff.
- Perform review signoff or broad documentation rewrites.

Expected outputs:
- Completed or blocked JSON describing test coverage, validation status, and follow-up needs.
- Precise defect or coverage notes when the bead cannot be completed within tester scope.
